methods.description: Analysis of conventionally drilled powder samples from stalagmite GAR-01 using a GV Instruments Multiflow-Isoprime system to study the d 18 O record.

steps.description: Conventionally drilled powder samples (drilled at a 2.2 mm spatial resolution) were analysed using a GV Instruments Multiflow-Isoprime systems at Royal Holloway University, London (RHUL).
steps.searchable_summary: analyze powder samples using GV Instruments Multiflow-Isoprime system

methods.description: High-resolution trace element analysis using a 193-nm wavelength excimer LA-ICPMS system to produce a Mg dataset across select intervals of the stalagmite.

steps.description: A 193-nm wavelength excimer LA-ICPMS system at RHUL (RESOlution M-50 prototype coupled to an Agilent 7500ce quadrupole ICP-MS) featuring a two-volume Laurin LA cell was used to produce a high-resolution Mg dataset across select intervals of the stalagmite.
steps.searchable_summary: use LA-ICPMS system to obtain Mg dataset

methods.method_name: LA-ICPMS Analysis of the 4.2 ka Event
methods.description: Monthly-scale LA-ICPMS trace element data collection across the interval containing the 4.2 ka event to reconstruct climate details and corroborate seasonality model results.

steps.description: Monthly-scale LA-ICPMS trace element data were obtained across the interval containing the 4.2 ka event, from 3.79 to 4.98 ka BP.
steps.searchable_summary: collect monthly-scale LA-ICPMS data for 4.2 ka event

steps.description: Mg concentrations in GAR-01 were previously interpreted as reflecting seaspray contribution.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze Mg concentrations for seaspray contribution
